name: Framing - Decode Only
description: Tests one-way decode cases where the binary is valid to decode but may not be the canonical encoding a conformant encoder would produce.

vectors.description: Decode-only: ACK FLOOD with trailing bytes beyond the 4-byte CRC payload
vectors.notes: Binary has 1 trailing byte after the 4-byte ACK CRC. Decoders MUST accept this (payload_len includes the extra byte). Encoders would not produce trailing bytes.

vectors.description: Decode-only: raw_custom FLOOD with path hash_count=0 but hash_size=2
vectors.notes: Path_len byte 0x40 encodes hash_size=2 (bits 6-7 = 01) with hash_count=0. Decoders must handle non-default hash_size even when hash_count is zero. Encoders typically default hash_size=1 when hash_count=0.

vectors.description: Decode-only: raw_custom FLOOD with path hash_size=3 and hash_count=0
vectors.notes: Path_len byte 0x80 encodes hash_size=3 (bits 6-7 = 10) with hash_count=0. Same as dec-002 but with hash_size=3.
